utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check each in the final plan: (1) health_coverage is present and includes both physical and mental health insurance with costs and a total monthly cost, so fully specified. (2) property_coverage is present and specifies home/contents insurance with costs and a total monthly cost; includes details like equipment coverage, so fully specified. (3) travel_coverage is present with plan and add-on and total monthly cost, so fully specified. (4) additional_services is present with services listed and their costs (stated as included, €0/month), so specified. (5) total_budget is present with monthly and annual costs and extra details, so fully specified. All 5 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Match each selected item name from the final plan to the exact corresponding option in the ground-truth ratings. For health physical, the plan lists 'LifeFirst Standard Physical Health', which corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage.physical_health with rating 9. For mental health, the plan lists 'LifeFirst Standard Mental Health', which corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage.mental_health with rating 4. For home contents, the plan lists 'EliteHome Premium Content Coverage', which corresponds to 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' under property_protection.home_content with rating 2. For equipment protection, 'Technology Protection Add-on' maps to 'Technology Protection' under property_enhancement_services with rating 8. For travel base, 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' maps to the same under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance with rating 3. For adventure activities, 'Adventure Travel Coverage Add-on' maps to 'Adventure Travel Coverage' under travel_enhancement_services with rating 10.
